title: Hacker Pack
description:
A pvp pack，focus on the visual effect of revising the high version of pvp.These include:
New weapons,armors,campfire log,respawn anchor and obsidian textures and so on
Lower fire
New sun(Jupiter actually)
Better particle,entity and font
body:
这是一个正在制作的材质包，着重于对高版本PVP进行一个视觉改变并向着视觉化的客户端靠近，这是我与diemoj的共同项目。
_This is a pack being made, focusing on a visual change to the high version of PVP and approaching the visual client. This is a joint project between diemoj and me._
# These include:
- New weapons,armors,campfire log,respawn anchor and obsidian textures and so on
- Lower fire
- New sun(Jupiter actually)
- Better particle,entity and font
- Smaller food
- Bubble is H₂O!
- Sweeping:
- ![Sweeping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93fa2a2b3159a84d1cfe4652dc840ae557a6fa53.png)
## Other
- Compatible with crystal PVP and TNT minecart PVP
- Survival is available
- Dark sky was removed after version 1.1
> Thank you for your using(´ ∀ ` *)
